name: High Severity Incident Review
description: Guided investigation workflow for high severity incidents.

steps.title: Confirm incident scope
steps.guidance: Review the incident details, impacted assets, and related alerts before taking containment action.

steps.title: Review related alerts
steps.guidance: Load alerts for the incident and identify the earliest signal, service source, and alert category.

steps.title: Identify entities
steps.guidance: Open the Entities view and capture users, devices, files, or IPs that need follow-up hunting.

steps.title: Decide containment path
steps.guidance: Use the action panel or related investigation tabs to choose appropriate containment and document the rationale.
